creator: mezz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Responsible Changed
From-To: gnome->lioux

You don't see any references on shotwell-0.6.1 source code to librsvg is 
because it is a 'plug-in' that you don't see it. When you want to open SVG 
image and the GTK+2 engine will load plug-in of 
lib/gtk-2.0/2.10.0/engines/libsvg.so. Yes, you do need to add the dependency 
if sotwell provides its own SVG files.
